questions.prompt: How many scored exam items does PSI allocate to Environmental Factors in the Oregon CCB outline?
questions.explanation: The PSI bulletin for Oregon Construction Contractors lists Environmental Factors as a domain with four scored items.

questions.prompt: For covered renovation work in pre-1978 target housing, which Oregon compliance concept is most directly triggered for contractors?
choices: Lead-related training/certification and contractor licensing compliance
No additional requirements if work is residential
Only a building permit from local jurisdiction
questions.explanation: Oregon CCB and OHA lead program materials indicate that covered pre-1978 renovation activities require lead-related training/certification pathways and contractor licensing alignment.

questions.prompt: Which Oregon rule location is identified by DEQ as the comprehensive asbestos rule set?
questions.explanation: DEQ asbestos program resources identify OAR chapter 340, division 248 as the comprehensive asbestos requirements rule set in Oregon.
